author: y4rr
content: Result: ferrotorch-bert crate added (5 source files, ~1600 LoC); pin script + verify harness + cargo test wrapper landed. End-to-end PASS: cosine_sim=1.000000, max_abs=0.000000, mean_abs=0.000000 (tolerances cosine>=0.999, max_abs<=0.01). HF mirror live at https://huggingface.co/ferrotorch/all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (sha256 53aa51172d142c89d9012cce15ae4d6cc0ca6895895114379cacb4fab128d9db, 22565376 params). 29/29 bert lib tests pass; vision (452) and llama (103) unchanged; cargo build --workspace clean; clippy clean on bert+hub. All 101 BERT parameter keys mapped, dropped keys (embeddings.position_ids int64 buffer + pooler.dense.{weight,bias}) captured in DropReport so the FPN-bias drop bug (#1141) shape cannot recur.
